case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY SHEILA B. LOCKETT BAIL BONDS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY SHEILA B. LOCKETT BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.00
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY SHEILA B. LOCKETT BAIL BONDS
